task_description: Implement contract scan PDF upload feature and notes field for renters/staff across backend and frontend, then update PRD documentation.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation (tsc --noEmit) passes with no errors. All Python files pass py_compile. PRD documentation verified with grep to contain all new entries. Review v1 issues addressed: handleActivate wrapped in try/catch, backend PDF content_type validation added, dashboard diacritics fixed.
